title: Marco Paul 6ft Luxury Snow-Flocked Christmas Garland - Battery Powered Pre-Lit Artificial Garland with 25 Warm White LEDs, Pine Cones & Berries - 180cm Thick Indoor Winter Garland for Fireplace
features: Christmas Garland with Lights - This luxury pre lit Christmas garland is 6ft/180cm long and features a thick snow-flocked finish with 25 warm white LEDs. Designed to bring festive ambience to your home, it creates a cosy glow ideal for winter decorating.

Pre Lit LED Garland - Fitted with 25 warm white LED lights for a soft glow, powered by 3x AA batteries (not included). Includes a timer function for convenient use, illuminating your garland for 6 hours on and 18 hours off to enhance your Christmas home decor.

Luxury Home Christmas Decor - Made for elegant seasonal styling, this garland delivers a full, rich appearance thanks to its dense tips and decorative accents. It blends seamlessly with modern or traditional Christmas decorations and complements your tree or table setup.

Indoor Christmas Decorations - Perfect for mantlepieces, stair banisters or framing doorways, this artificial Christmas garland adds a premium festive touch. The snow effect combined with pine cones and berries creates a stylish winter wonderland look indoors.

Versatile Festive Display - Use as a Christmas fireplace garland, staircase decoration or table centrepiece. The flexible design allows you to drape, wrap or style it anywhere indoors, creating a welcoming festive focal point in any room.
description: Bring a touch of luxury to your festive styling with the Marco Paul 6ft / 180cm Snow-Flocked Christmas Garland. Designed for indoor use, this thick artificial garland features a beautifully frosted finish, decorated with pine cones, berries and realistic foliage to create a premium winter wonderland look. With a generous length for versatile display, it can be styled along your fireplace, draped across stair banisters or used as a striking Christmas table centrepiece. Warm white LED lights are delicately woven through the garland, casting a soft ambient glow that enhances the cosy atmosphere of your home. Powered by 3x AA batteries (not included) with a built-in 6 hour on / 18 hour off timer, it offers effortless seasonal decorating with no plug sockets required. The full and flexible design allows you to shape the garland to suit your space, whether framing a doorway or adding depth to your Christmas decor arrangement. This pre lit Christmas garland is made to complement both classic and modern home Christmas decorations, making it a timeless festive piece you can enjoy year after year. Ideal for those who want to achieve a polished seasonal look without the maintenance of real greenery, it adds instant warmth and style to any indoor setting.
